web.title: MySQL 8.4 Release Notes :: Changes in MySQL 8.4.8 (2026-01-20)
web.description: A new error code ER_IB_MSG_LOG_WRITER_WAIT_ON_NEW_LOG_FILE_INFO is added to include the current log capacity and the current log capacity used.
